headline: The Nasdaq's Historic Rally Doesn't Mean the Risk Is Gone
summary: Marc Chaikin of Chaikin Analytics shares seven bullish stock picks across AI infrastructure and semiconductors while warning investors to trim software and cybersecurity holdings.

headline: Software stock dogs have joined market rally. There's a classic investing lesson in the rebound
summary: In a 2026 market that had Microsoft down close to 20%, looking for opportunities to buy after big drawdowns is coming to more tech and software stocks.

headline: Morgan Stanley takes a deeper look at AI’s impact on software developers
summary: Investing.com -- The rapid adoption of generative AI across the enterprise landscape has sparked intense, often heated debate on Wall Street regarding the future of the human software engineer.

headline: Palo Alto Networks Deepens AI Security Role With Glasswing And NWN Deals
summary: Palo Alto Networks is joining Project Glasswing as a founding partner to apply advanced AI to global cybersecurity threats. The company is also expanding its collaboration with NWN to deliver Prisma Access powered managed security services to public sector clients. These moves highlight a focus on AI driven cyber defense and managed security support for critical infrastructure operators. For investors following NasdaqGS:PANW, these developments arrive as the stock trades around $167.85 and...
